linting.notes: No linting tools configured. No .golangci.yml, .flake8, ruff config, or other linter configurations found in the repository.

testing.notes: Python tests use pytest with 3 test functions. Tests check embedded OCI layout and constants. Go code has no tests (no *_test.go files found). The Makefile provides convenient targets: 'make sync' for dependencies, 'make test' for running tests.

gating_checks.name: E2E KServe Integration
gating_checks.command: Full KServe deployment with kubectl (requires Kind cluster)

ci.notes: Two workflows trigger on pull_request: build.yaml (container build) and e2e.yaml (E2E tests including Python unit tests and KServe integration). The e2e-python job is the core gating check for Python code changes. The e2e-kserve job requires a Kubernetes cluster and tests full KServe integration.

build.notes: Python package uses uv for dependency management. Full build requires 'skopeo' tool to copy container images to OCI layout. The 'prepare' step (uv run python src/modelcar_base_image/prepare.py) downloads the base container image. Go code builds via multi-stage Containerfile using ubi8/go-toolset:1.22 builder image.

conventions.test_naming: Python: test_* functions in Test* classes or standalone
conventions.notes: Python tests configured in pyproject.toml under [tool.pytest.ini_options]. Go uses single-file main package with no external dependencies.

setup_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y make git curl
container_recipe.notes: The Python package builds and tests successfully. The full 'make build' requires skopeo to copy container images, but this is not needed for test validation. Tests only require uv and Python dependencies.
